title: ratibida coahuilensis
intro: Ratibida coahuilensis is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant's medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ratibida coahuilensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Ratibida coahuilensis can be prepared as a tea or decoction for consumption, and its root is sometimes used in herbal preparations.
